name: Southern Dagaare
notes: Southern Dagaare, a Gur (Mabia) language of northwestern Ghana and Burkina Faso. STUB: the grapheme inventory is NOT yet specified. Written in a Latin orthography using African-reference-alphabet letters (ɛ, ɔ, ŋ) and marking ATR vowel harmony and lexical tone inconsistently; no reliable published letter-to-phoneme table was consulted, so no grapheme map is claimed. wikidata_qid left unset: the code's Wikidata row resolves to the Wikimedia project item, not the language item; not recorded rather than record a wrong id.
